I couldn't find any information on the plant Solenopsis bivonaeana. However, I can provide you with the following general information about the genus Solenopsis.

Solenopsis is a genus of plants in the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the nightshade or potato family. The health benefits of Solenopsis plants are not well-documented, but some species in this genus have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Solenopsis plants include solanocapsine, solanine, and solasodine, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Solenopsis plants are not commonly used in herbal medicine, but some species are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, and herbal preparations made from these plants may include infusions, tinctures, and capsules.
